leadText: Potato Salad (Japanese: ポテトサラダ Potato Salad) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V This very tart ingredient—a soft salad that's all about potatoes—pairs tremendously well with bread.
